reviews.review_description: The games simple and kinda low quality but I Still like it and its Goofyness and simplicity! I do like it :D

I think this game has the potential to be a great game it does have some problems, mostly in the main map design the fact that people can easily get out of the map could be a problem when mod vents get added.

If this gets worked on, it could become a good game. It's a little buggy, but not too bad to the point where it's unplayed. It actually makes it fun. But the mod team has no idea what they're doing. Kicked numerous times, and even banned (then swiftly unbanned after telling the owner,) for nothing.
